LionBay Holdings Ltd. (UEN: 201934567A) — PDPA DSAR & Retention Workflow (Singapore)
Scope: Applies to LionBay Holdings Ltd. (listed issuer) and its data intermediaries (e.g., Jade Crane Law LLC, Harbour Quay Advisory Pte. Ltd.) across M&A, employment, and capital-markets workstreams.
Contact & submission: DSARs to dpo@lionbayholdings.sg or 1800-555-2727 (public helpline); mail: 15 Coral Walk, #12-34, Singapore 123456.
Form labels accepted: FULL NAME, NRIC/FIN, EMPLOYEE ID, CONTACT NO.; we verify via last 3 characters only and redact the rest.
Examples that will be masked on disclosure: NRIC/FIN S0000000A (invalid checksum), Passport No. E0000000 (invalid), Employee ID EMP-0000.
Company identifiers we process include LionBay Holdings Ltd. UEN 201934567A and GST Reg. 201934567A; intermediaries include Jade Crane Law LLC and Harbour Quay Advisory Pte. Ltd.
Banking and billing: Seahorse Bank Ltd. Acct No. 000-000-000-000 (placeholder format only); no card PANs are stored and no eGIRO forms are sent by email.
Retention: HR records 7 years post-cessation; M&A data rooms until completion + 6 years; securities dealing records retained per MAS/SFA requirements; quarterly purge reviews.
Access/correction: acknowledge within 2 business days and respond within 30 days under PDPA; charges (if any) kept reasonable in line with PDPC guidance; unjustified requests may be refused with reasons.
MNPI handling: if DSARs touch board papers or mandate drafts, we assess under SFA and SGX-ST Listing Rule 703; if not generally available, we provide high-level summaries and defer specifics until SGXNet disclosure.
We do not release counterparties’ indicative pricing, insider lists, blackout timetables, or draft announcements before public release; references here are illustrative and not price-sensitive.
Cross-border transfers: comply with PDPA s26 Transfer Limitation Obligation; for processors in Johor we use contractual clauses and comparable protection with Transfer Impact Assessments in the register.
Security and audit: role-based access, immutable logs, DPO oversight, and SGX blackout tracking for designated persons; internal notices use role titles (e.g., Director, Capital Markets) rather than full names.
Submission channels prefer generic mailboxes (e.g., mna-team@lionbayholdings.sg) and public helplines; please do not transmit originals of IDs or payslips.
This note is illustrative; shapes such as 8000-000-0000, Postal 000000, or “Account No.: ______” are examples and should not be treated as personal data or valid accounts.
